---
title: "sleep(00)"
author: "Mohamed Mohamed"
date: "2026-04-30"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
```

# Hypotheses:
#   H0:  mu_work = mu_nonwork    (no difference in mean sleep)
#   H1:  mu_work != mu_nonwork   (means differ — two-tailed)
#   alpha = 0.05


```{r}
sleep_data <- data.frame(
  Date = as.Date(c("2026-04-06","2026-04-07","2026-04-08","2026-04-09","2026-04-10",
                   "2026-04-11","2026-04-12","2026-04-13","2026-04-14","2026-04-15",
                   "2026-04-16","2026-04-17","2026-04-18","2026-04-19","2026-04-20",
                   "2026-04-21","2026-04-22","2026-04-23","2026-04-24","2026-04-25",
                   "2026-04-26")),
  Day_of_Week = c("Monday","Tuesday","Wednesday","Thursday","Friday",
                  "Saturday","Sunday","Monday","Tuesday","Wednesday",
                  "Thursday","Friday","Saturday","Sunday","Monday",
                  "Tuesday","Wednesday","Thursday","Friday","Saturday","Sunday"),
  Day_Type = c("Work Day","Non Work Day","Work Day","Work Day","Work Day",
               "Non Work Day","Work Day","Work Day","Non Work Day","Non Work Day",
               "Work Day","Work Day","Work Day","Work Day","Work Day",
               "Non Work Day","Non Work Day","Work Day","Work Day","Non Work Day","Work Day"),
  Sleep_Hours = c(6, 6, 9.25, 8, 9,
                  6.27, 8.02, 8, 8.25, 7.5,
                  4.5, 7.5, 8.66, 9, 8.82,
                  8, 7, 8.82, 8.17, 5.15, 9),
  School = factor(c("yes","no","no","yes","no",
                    "no","no","yes","no","no",
                    "yes","no","no","no","yes",
                    "no","no","yes","no","no","no"),
                  levels = c("yes","no"),
                  labels = c("School Day","No School"))
)

sleep_data$Day_Type <- factor(sleep_data$Day_Type,
                              levels = c("Work Day", "Non Work Day"))

# Quick look at the data
cat("\n--- Structure of the data ---\n")
str(sleep_data)

cat("\n--- First 6 rows ---\n")
print(head(sleep_data))

cat("\n--- Counts per group ---\n")
print(table(sleep_data$Day_Type))

# 2. Summary statistics
cat("\n--- Overall summary of Sleep_Hours ---\n")
print(summary(sleep_data$Sleep_Hours))

cat("\n--- Group statistics (n, mean, median, sd, min, max) ---\n")
group_stats <- aggregate(
  Sleep_Hours ~ Day_Type,
  data = sleep_data,
  FUN  = function(x) c(
    n      = length(x),
    mean   = round(mean(x), 2),
    median = round(median(x), 2),
    sd     = round(sd(x), 2),
    min    = min(x),
    max    = max(x)
  )
)
print(group_stats)

# 3a. Boxplot
boxplot(Sleep_Hours ~ Day_Type,
        data  = sleep_data,
        main  = "Sleep Hours by Day Type",
        col   = c("#2E86AB", "#E63946"),
        xlab  = "Day Type",
        ylab  = "Sleep Hours",
        ylim  = c(4, 10))

# 3b. Bar chart with error bars using ggplot2


ggplot(sleep_data, aes(x = Day_Type, y = Sleep_Hours, fill = Day_Type)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", width = 0.5) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.15, linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 7, linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgreen") +
  annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = 7.2, label = "CDC min (7 hrs)", color = "darkgreen", size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Work Day" = "#2E86AB", "Non Work Day" = "#E63946")) +
  labs(title = "Mean Sleep Hours by Day Type",
       x = "Day Type",
       y = "Mean Sleep Hours (+/- SD)") +
  ylim(0, 11) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# 3c. Daily time series
ggplot(sleep_data, aes(x = Date, y = Sleep_Hours, color = Day_Type)) +
  geom_line(color = "gray60", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = Day_Type), pch = 21, color = "black", size = 3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = mean(sleep_data$Sleep_Hours), linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 7, linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgreen") +
  annotate("text", x = min(sleep_data$Date), y = 7.2, 
           label = "CDC min (7 hrs)", color = "darkgreen", size = 3.2, hjust = 0) +
  annotate("text", x = min(sleep_data$Date), 
           y = mean(sleep_data$Sleep_Hours) + 0.2,
           label = "Overall mean", color = "black", size = 3.2, hjust = 0) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Work Day" = "#2E86AB", "Non Work Day" = "#E63946")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Work Day" = "#2E86AB", "Non Work Day" = "#E63946")) +
  labs(title = "Daily Sleep Hours Over 3-Week Tracking Period",
       x = "Date",
       y = "Sleep Hours",
       fill = "Day Type") +
  ylim(4, 10) +
  theme_minimal() +
  guides(color = "none")

# 4. T-Test + Decision
test_result <- t.test(Sleep_Hours ~ Day_Type,
                      data        = sleep_data,
                      alternative = "two.sided")

cat("\n--- t-test result ---\n")
print(test_result)

alpha <- 0.05
p_val <- test_result$p.value

cat(sprintf("\nt-statistic = %.4f\n", test_result$statistic))
cat(sprintf("df          = %.4f\n", test_result$parameter))
cat(sprintf("p-value     = %.4f\n", p_val))
cat(sprintf("alpha       = %.2f\n\n", alpha))

if (p_val < alpha) {
  cat("Decision: REJECT H0 — there IS a significant difference in mean sleep hours between work and non-work days.\n")
} else {
  cat("Decision: FAIL TO REJECT H0 — there is NOT enough evidence to conclude the mean sleep hours differ.\n")
}
```
